description_long: This object is a modern pump-action shotgun with a matte black barrel and receiver, paired with tan synthetic furniture including the stock and fore-end. The shotgun features a full stock with a straight comb and a thick, textured buttpad for recoil absorption. The fore-end is ribbed for improved grip and is colored to match the stock, while the barrel is long and smooth with no visible ribbing or venting. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for gloved fingers. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for tactical or home defense use in urban environments.
description: A modern pump-action shotgun with a black barrel and tan synthetic stock and fore-end, featuring a full stock and ribbed fore-end for grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the tan synthetic stock, ribbed fore-end, and black barrel.
description_view_1: Top-down view displaying the parallel alignment of the barrel and stock, and the width of the fore-end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other side of the shotgun with clear visibility of the stock and fore-end.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the underside of the stock and fore-end, as well as the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, smooth and long with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
